title: selaginella anomala
intro: Selaginella anomala, also known as the "tiger's tail" or "spikemoss," is a species of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella anomala include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as bronchitis, asthma, and allergies. Selaginella anomala can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various herbal preparations.
